channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: South African Student Sets World Record With 47 Splits In One Minute

media:content.media:description: Chaz Wilson achieved the most splits in one minute in male category.

item.description: He was inspired to attempt this record title after seeing Liberty Barros set the record at 42 in 2024 for the female title.
item.content:encoded: He was inspired to attempt this record title after seeing Liberty Barros set the record at 42 in 2024 for the female title.

item.title: PM Modi Leaves For Italy After Norway Visit, India-Nordic Summit

media:content.media:description: PM Modi is visiting Italy on the invitation of his Italian counterpart Giorgia Meloni.

item.description: During his two-day visit, PM Modi held separate talks with his counterparts, Norway Prime Minister Store, Iceland Prime Minister Kristrun Frostadottir, Finland Prime Minister Petteri Orpo and Denmark Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen.
item.content:encoded: During his two-day visit, PM Modi held separate talks with his counterparts, Norway Prime Minister Store, Iceland Prime Minister Kristrun Frostadottir, Finland Prime Minister Petteri Orpo and Denmark Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen.

item.title: Spanish Court Sets $1 Million Bail For Mango Founder's Son In Murder Inquiry

media:content.media:description: Jonathan Andic was also ordered to surrender his passport

item.description: The eldest son of Mango clothing empire founder Isak Andic paid one million euros (1.1 million dollars) in bail after he was arrested as part of a murder inquiry into his father's 2024 death, a court said Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: The eldest son of Mango clothing empire founder Isak Andic paid one million euros (1.1 million dollars) in bail after he was arrested as part of a murder inquiry into his father's 2024 death, a court said Tuesday.

item.title: NATO Discussing Deploying Troops In Hormuz If It Isn't Opened By July: Report

media:content.media:description: The idea has support from several members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organisation

item.description: The idea has support from several members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organisation, but doesn't yet have the necessary unanimous support, said a diplomat from a NATO country.
item.content:encoded: The idea has support from several members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organisation, but doesn't yet have the necessary unanimous support, said a diplomat from a NATO country.

item.title: Democracy, Rule Of Law Make Us "Natural Partners": PM Modi At Nordic Summit

media:content.media:description: PM Modi reached the Norwegian capital on Monday.

item.description: The Prime Minister expressed his appreciation for the collective diplomatic efforts, warmly thanking the host nation and greeting his European counterparts.
item.content:encoded: The Prime Minister expressed his appreciation for the collective diplomatic efforts, warmly thanking the host nation and greeting his European counterparts.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Xi Is Truly Done Falling For The Great American Bluff
item.description: The Chinese and others have long sized up Trump. As a person, he does not inspire trust. His transactional approach, erratic behaviour, ego-driven approach, brutal pressure tactics make him an unreliable interlocutor.
item.content:encoded: The Chinese and others have long sized up Trump. As a person, he does not inspire trust. His transactional approach, erratic behaviour, ego-driven approach, brutal pressure tactics make him an unreliable interlocutor.

item.title: Amid Surgery, Prosthetic Claims, Iran Says Mojtaba Has 'Scratch Behind Ear'

media:content.media:description: Earlier this month, a report by the New York Times stated that Mojtaba is "gravely wounded"

item.description: In Iran's first comment on Khamenei's injuries, Fars News, the country's semi-official news agency, said that the Supreme Leader was "in full health".
item.content:encoded: In Iran's first comment on Khamenei's injuries, Fars News, the country's semi-official news agency, said that the Supreme Leader was "in full health".

item.title: Mango Clothing Empire Founder's Son Arrested In Spain Over Father's Death

media:content.media:description: At the time of his death, Forbes estimated Isak's fortune at $4.5 billion.

item.description: Spanish police said Tuesday they have arrested the eldest son of Mango clothing empire founder Isak Andic over his father's death during a hiking trip in December 2024.
item.content:encoded: Spanish police said Tuesday they have arrested the eldest son of Mango clothing empire founder Isak Andic over his father's death during a hiking trip in December 2024.

item.title: Putin To Visit Delhi In September For BRICS Summit

media:content.media:description: India will be hosting the annual summit of BRICS in September as the chair of the group

item.description: Putin To Visit Delhi In September For BRICS Summit
item.content:encoded: Putin To Visit Delhi In September For BRICS Summit

item.title: Thailand Cuts Visa-Free Stays For Tourists, Citing Crime By Foreigners

media:content.media:description: Tourists will be able to renew visas once by visiting an immigration office

item.description: Thailand is drastically cutting the length of visa-free stays for tourists from more than 90 countries in an effort to curb crime involving foreign nationals, officials said on Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: Thailand is drastically cutting the length of visa-free stays for tourists from more than 90 countries in an effort to curb crime involving foreign nationals, officials said on Tuesday.

item.title: Does Donald Trump's Iran Off-Ramp Run Through China, Russia?
item.description: China and Russia provide Iran with critical but limited support, including discounted crude oil purchases and satellite intelligence.
item.content:encoded: China and Russia provide Iran with critical but limited support, including discounted crude oil purchases and satellite intelligence.

item.title: "Fully Functional": Air India On London-Delhi Boeing 787 Fuel Switch Test
item.description: The Air India statement was in response to a Reuters report that said officials from the national regulator - the DGCA - were planning to travel to Boeing's head office in the US to observe the manufacture testing the recovered panel.
item.content:encoded: The Air India statement was in response to a Reuters report that said officials from the national regulator - the DGCA - were planning to travel to Boeing's head office in the US to observe the manufacture testing the recovered panel.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | 3 Blasts In A Week: Pakistan's Taliban Blowback Is Entering A Dangerous New Phase
item.description: Last week, multiple terror attacks rocked the restive provinces of Balochistan and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. First came an IED attack, then a suicide blast, with militants taking weapons and police personnel from the site, then a bomb blast.
item.content:encoded: Last week, multiple terror attacks rocked the restive provinces of Balochistan and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. First came an IED attack, then a suicide blast, with militants taking weapons and police personnel from the site, then a bomb blast.

item.title: PM Modi Holds Talks With Nordic Counterparts Ahead Of Oslo Summit

media:content.media:description: PM Modi held the meetings ahead of the 3rd India-Nordic Summit.

item.description: The Nordic countries refer to a geopolitical and cultural region in Northern Europe and the North Atlantic. It comprises Denmark, Finland, Iceland, Norway and Sweden.
item.content:encoded: The Nordic countries refer to a geopolitical and cultural region in Northern Europe and the North Atlantic. It comprises Denmark, Finland, Iceland, Norway and Sweden.

item.title: Ebola Outbreak: Africa CDC Declares Continental Emergency

media:content.media:description: Africa CDC has declared a continental emergency over the Ebola outbreak

item.description: The Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa CDC) has declared the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo and Uganda a Continental Public Health Emergency...
item.content:encoded: The Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa CDC) has declared the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo and Uganda a Continental Public Health Emergency...

item.title: Watch: Pope Leo XIV Joins Viral "Six-Seven" Trend With Children

media:content.media:description: Pope Leo XIV repeated the phrase and also copied the hand movement.

item.description: The trend has gained popularity as a viral trend rather than a phrase with a fixed meaning.
item.content:encoded: The trend has gained popularity as a viral trend rather than a phrase with a fixed meaning.

item.title: Rehman Gali Becomes Ram Gali: Why Pak Is Changing Names Of Lahore Streets

media:content.media:description: The renaming campaign is part of a much larger 'Lahore Heritage Area Revival' (LHAR) project

item.description: History bears witness that, ever since the partition, the plight of minorities in Pakistan-- particularly Hindus and Sikhs -- has been a matter of grave concern. However, the name change drive has unfolded with almost no organised opposition in a cou
item.content:encoded: History bears witness that, ever since the partition, the plight of minorities in Pakistan-- particularly Hindus and Sikhs -- has been a matter of grave concern. However, the name change drive has unfolded with almost no organised opposition in a cou

item.title: US Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Holds Off Iran Attack Planned For Tuesday After Gulf Intervention
item.description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Why Freebies Work Brilliantly, Until They Suddenly Don't: A Tamil Nadu Paradox
item.description: Freebies work under three conditions - and fail when any one of those conditions is absent.
item.content:encoded: Freebies work under three conditions - and fail when any one of those conditions is absent.

item.title: Trump Threatens Fresh Strikes On Iran. How Tehran Could Respond

media:content.media:description: Tehran could also try to exert control over the Bab al-Mandeb Strait

item.description: Intensifying attacks on Arab energy infrastructure-- like oil fields, refineries and ports -- is one of the most potent ways in which the Islamic Republic could inflict pain on the global economy and put pressure on Trump.
item.content:encoded: Intensifying attacks on Arab energy infrastructure-- like oil fields, refineries and ports -- is one of the most potent ways in which the Islamic Republic could inflict pain on the global economy and put pressure on Trump.
